summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Falcon Web Studio features including lead capture modal, flying falcon animation, and backend API integration. All new features working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate.
passed_tests: New falcon logo displays correctly in navigation header with proper image source
Request Free Website Preview button in hero section opens lead capture modal
CTA section Request Free Website Preview button opens lead capture modal
Lead capture modal contains all required fields: Name, Email, Business Name, Website URL, Message
Lead capture modal form fields have proper placeholders and validation
Lead capture form successfully submits to POST /api/leads endpoint
Form submission shows success behavior (modal closes after submission)
Flying falcon animation element is present and responds to scrolling
All existing sections work correctly: Services, Portfolio, Process, Testimonials, CTA, Footer
Backend POST /api/leads endpoint successfully creates leads with full data
Backend POST /api/leads endpoint successfully creates leads with minimal required data
Backend POST /api/leads endpoint properly validates and rejects invalid data (422 status)
Backend GET /api/leads endpoint successfully retrieves stored leads
Backend root API endpoint (/api/) responds correctly
